chat_log.content:
I see from your profile that we were working on your 30-day goal: **First real external conversation**. You're at the commitment phase.

You have an active commitment on the books: post a 3-sentence description of the downtime tracking system on LinkedIn by Thursday May 28 — the 23% number, what it does, and that you're available to build this for other manufacturers.

You also have a pending action step: use your new bio in a real introduction — send it to one operations director or plant manager on LinkedIn you don't know personally, by Sunday May 25.

What happened with that LinkedIn message?
